revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '神野神社は、満濃池の守護神として奉斎され延喜式内讃岐二十四社の一つにかぞえられた古社である。'
revision.text: 神野神社は、満濃池の守護神として奉斎され延喜式内讃岐二十四社の一つにかぞえられた古社である。
:神野神社は、満濃池の守護神として奉斎され延喜式内讃岐二十四社の一つにかぞえられた古社である。 :(香川県仲多度郡まんのう町神野)
:神野(かんの)神社は、[[満濃池]]の守護神として奉斎され延喜式内讃岐二十四社の一つにかぞえられた古社である。 :祭神は[[罔象女命]]、[[天穗日命]]、[[別雷命]]、[[嵯峨天皇]]とされる。 :(香川県仲多度郡[[まんのう町]]神野)

revision.comment: [[神野神社]]を[[神野神社 (まんのう町)]]へ移動: 同名の神社が複数存在する。

revision.text:
{{出典の明記|date=2010年12月}} '''神野神社'''（かんのじんじゃ）は、[[香川県]][[仲多度郡]][[まんのう町]]神野にあり、[[満濃池]]の守護神として奉斎され延喜式内讃岐二十四社の一つにかぞえられた古社である。
祭神は[[罔象女命]]、[[天穗日命]]、[[別雷命]]、[[嵯峨天皇]]とされる。 [[http://kagawa.bine.jp/jinnjya/manou/53kano/kanno53.html]]

{{nihongo|'''Kanno Shrine'''|神野神社 (まんのう町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sanuki Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kanno Shrine'''|神野神社 (まんのう町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sanuki Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kanno Shrine'''|神野神社 (まんのう町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sanuki Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kanno Shrine'''|神野神社 (まんのう町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sanuki Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kanno Shrine'''|神野神社 (まんのう町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sanuki Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kanno Shrine'''|神野神社 (まんのう町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sanuki Province]].

{{ill|Kamunono Shrine|lt=Kamunono Shrine|WD=Q135041391}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '香川県仲多度郡まんのう町神野168-2', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:神野神社 (まんのう町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11590985}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2010年12月}} {{神社 |名称= 神野神社 |画像= [[File:Kannozinzya0ɨ.jpg|250px]]
鳥居と拝殿 |所在地= {{jalink|香川県|Q161454}}{{jalink|仲多度郡|Q1206155}}{{jalink|まんのう町|Q1350204}}神野168-2 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{jalink|罔象女命}}、{{jalink|天穂日命}}、{{jalink|別雷命}}、{{jalink|嵯峨天皇|Q316654}} |社格= {{jalink|式内社}} |創建= {{jalink|平安時代|Q193292}}初期 |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kagawa|label=神野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''神野神社'''（かんのじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|香川県|Q161454}}{{jalink|仲多度郡|Q1206155}}{{jalink|まんのう町|Q1350204}}神野にあり、{{jalink|満濃池|Q20983084}}の守護神として奉斎され延喜式内讃岐二十四社の一つにかぞえられた古社である。 祭神は{{jalink|罔象女命}}、{{jalink|天穂日命}}、{{jalink|別雷命}}、{{jalink|嵯峨天皇|Q316654}}とされる[http://kagawa.bine.jp/jinnjya/manou/53kano/kanno53.html 神野神社]。 File:Kannnozinzya02.jpg|境内から見る満濃池 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Pref-substub|pref=香川県}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かんのしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sanuki Province]] [[Category:香川県の神社]] [[Category:讃岐国の式内社]] [[Category:まんのう町の建築物]] [[Category:まんのう町の歴史]] [[Category:pages]]

[[JA:神野神社 (まんのう町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11590985}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2010年12月}} {{神社 |名称= 神野神社 |画像= [[File:Kannozinzya0ɨ.jpg|250px]]
鳥居と拝殿 |所在地= {{jalink|香川県|Q161454}}{{jalink|仲多度郡|Q1206155}}{{jalink|まんのう町|Q1350204}}神野168-2 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{jalink|罔象女命}}、{{jalink|天穂日命}}、{{jalink|別雷命}}、{{jalink|嵯峨天皇|Q316654}} |社格= {{jalink|式内社}} |創建= {{jalink|平安時代|Q193292}}初期 |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kagawa|label=神野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''神野神社'''（かんのじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|香川県|Q161454}}{{jalink|仲多度郡|Q1206155}}{{jalink|まんのう町|Q1350204}}神野にあり、{{jalink|満濃池|Q20983084}}の守護神として奉斎され延喜式内讃岐二十四社の一つにかぞえられた古社である。 祭神は{{jalink|罔象女命}}、{{jalink|天穂日命}}、{{jalink|別雷命}}、{{jalink|嵯峨天皇|Q316654}}とされる[http://kagawa.bine.jp/jinnjya/manou/53kano/kanno53.html 神野神社]。 File:Kannnozinzya02.jpg|境内から見る満濃池 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Pref-substub|pref=香川県}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かんのしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sanuki Province]] [[Category:香川県の神社]] [[Category:讃岐国の式内社]] [[Category:まんのう町の建築物]] [[Category:まんのう町の歴史]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

[[JA:神野神社 (まんのう町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11590985}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2010年12月}} {{神社 |名称= 神野神社 |画像= [[File:Kannozinzya0ɨ.jpg|250px]]
鳥居と拝殿 |所在地= {{jalink|香川県|Q161454}}{{jalink|仲多度郡|Q1206155}}{{jalink|まんのう町|Q1350204}}神野168-2 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{jalink|罔象女命}}、{{jalink|天穂日命}}、{{jalink|別雷命}}、{{jalink|嵯峨天皇|Q316654}} |社格= {{jalink|式内社}} |創建= {{jalink|平安時代|Q193292}}初期 |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kagawa|label=神野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''神野神社'''（かんのじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|香川県|Q161454}}{{jalink|仲多度郡|Q1206155}}{{jalink|まんのう町|Q1350204}}神野にあり、{{jalink|満濃池|Q20983084}}の守護神として奉斎され延喜式内讃岐二十四社の一つにかぞえられた古社である。 祭神は{{jalink|罔象女命}}、{{jalink|天穂日命}}、{{jalink|別雷命}}、{{jalink|嵯峨天皇|Q316654}}とされる[http://kagawa.bine.jp/jinnjya/manou/53kano/kanno53.html 神野神社]。 File:Kannnozinzya02.jpg|境内から見る満濃池 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Pref-substub|pref=香川県}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かんのしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sanuki Province]] [[Category:香川県の神社]] [[Category:讃岐国の式内社]] [[Category:まんのう町の建築物]] [[Category:まんのう町の歴史]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

[[JA:神野神社 (まんのう町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11590985}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2010年12月}} {{神社 |名称= 神野神社 |画像= [[File:Kannozinzya0ɨ.jpg|250px]]
鳥居と拝殿 |所在地= {{jalink|香川県|Q161454}}{{jalink|仲多度郡|Q1206155}}{{jalink|まんのう町|Q1350204}}神野168-2 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{jalink|罔象女命}}、{{jalink|天穂日命}}、{{jalink|別雷命}}、{{jalink|嵯峨天皇|Q316654}} |社格= {{jalink|式内社}} |創建= {{jalink|平安時代|Q193292}}初期 |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kagawa|label=神野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''神野神社'''（かんのじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|香川県|Q161454}}{{jalink|仲多度郡|Q1206155}}{{jalink|まんのう町|Q1350204}}神野にあり、{{jalink|満濃池|Q20983084}}の守護神として奉斎され延喜式内讃岐二十四社の一つにかぞえられた古社である。 祭神は{{jalink|罔象女命}}、{{jalink|天穂日命}}、{{jalink|別雷命}}、{{jalink|嵯峨天皇|Q316654}}とされる[http://kagawa.bine.jp/jinnjya/manou/53kano/kanno53.html 神野神社]。 File:Kannnozinzya02.jpg|境内から見る満濃池 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Pref-substub|pref=香川県}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かんのしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sanuki Province]] [[Category:香川県の神社]] [[Category:讃岐国の式内社]] [[Category:まんのう町の建築物]] [[Category:まんのう町の歴史]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

[[JA:神野神社 (まんのう町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11590985}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2010年12月}} {{神社 |名称= Kanno Shrine |画像= [[File:Kannozinzya0ɨ.jpg|250px]]
Torii and worship hall |所在地= {{jalink|Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454}}{{jalink|Nakatado District|Q1206155}}{{jalink|Manno|Q1350204}} Kanno 168-2 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{jalink|Mizuhanome no Mikoto}}、{{jalink|Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto}}、{{jalink|Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto}}、{{jalink|Emperor Sujun|Q316654}} |社格= {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} |創建= early {{jalink|Heian period|Q193292}} |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kagawa|label=神野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Kanno Shrine''' (かんのじんじゃ) is a historic shrine in Kanno, {{jalink|Manno|Q1350204}}, {{jalink|Nakatado District|Q1206155}}, {{jalink|Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454}}. It was enshrined as guardian deity of {{jalink|Mannō Pond|Q20983084}} and counted as one of the 24 Engishiki shrines of Sanuki. The enshrined deities are said to be {{jalink|Mizuhanome no Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto}}, and {{jalink|Emperor Sujun|Q316654}}[http://kagawa.bine.jp/jinnjya/manou/53kano/kanno53.html Kanno Shrine]. File:Kannnozinzya02.jpg|Mannō Pond viewed from the precincts === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Pref-substub|pref=香川県}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かんのしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sanuki Province]] [[Category:香川県の神社]] [[Category:讃岐国の式内社]] [[Category:まんのう町の建築物]] [[Category:まんのう町の歴史]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

Torii and worship hall |所在地= {{jalink|Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454}}{{jalink|Nakatado District|Q1206155}}{{jalink|Manno|Q1350204}} Kanno 168-2 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{jalink|Mizuhanome no Mikoto}}、{{jalink|Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto}}、{{jalink|Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto}}、{{jalink|Emperor Sujun|Q316654}} |社格= {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} |創建= early {{jalink|Heian period|Q193292}} |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kagawa|label=神野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Kanno Shrine''' (かんのじんじゃ) is a historic shrine in Kanno, {{jalink|Manno|Q1350204}}, {{jalink|Nakatado District|Q1206155}}, {{jalink|Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454}}. It was enshrined as guardian deity of {{jalink|Mannō Pond|Q20983084}} and counted as one of the 24 Engishiki shrines of Sanuki. The enshrined deities are said to be {{jalink|Mizuhanome no Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto}}, and {{jalink|Emperor Sujun|Q316654}}[http://kagawa.bine.jp/jinnjya/manou/53kano/kanno53.html Kanno Shrine]. File:Kannnozinzya02.jpg|Mannō Pond viewed from the precincts === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Pref-substub|pref=香川県}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かんのしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sanuki Province]] [[Category:香川県の神社]] [[Category:讃岐国の式内社]] [[Category:まんのう町の建築物]] [[Category:まんのう町の歴史]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

It was enshrined as guardian deity of {{jalink|Mannō Pond|Q20983084}} and counted as one of the 24 Engishiki shrines of Sanuki. The enshrined deities are said to be {{jalink|Mizuhanome no Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto}}, and {{jalink|Emperor Sujun|Q316654}}[http://kagawa.bine.jp/jinnjya/manou/53kano/kanno53.html Kanno Shrine]. Torii and worship hall |所在地= {{jalink|Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454}}{{jalink|Nakatado District|Q1206155}}{{jalink|Manno|Q1350204}} Kanno 168-2 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{jalink|Mizuhanome no Mikoto}}、{{jalink|Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto}}、{{jalink|Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto}}、{{jalink|Emperor Sujun|Q316654}} |社格= {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} |創建= early {{jalink|Heian period|Q193292}} |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kagawa|label=神野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Kanno Shrine''' (かんのじんじゃ) is a historic shrine in Kanno, {{jalink|Manno|Q1350204}}, {{jalink|Nakatado District|Q1206155}}, {{jalink|Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454}}. It was enshrined as guardian deity of {{jalink|Mannō Pond|Q20983084}} and counted as one of the 24 Engishiki shrines of Sanuki. The enshrined deities are said to be {{jalink|Mizuhanome no Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto}}, and {{jalink|Emperor Sujun|Q316654}}[http://kagawa.bine.jp/jinnjya/manou/53kano/kanno53.html Kanno Shrine]. [[JA:神野神社 (まんのう町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11590985}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2010年12月}} {{神社 |名称= Kanno Shrine |画像= [[File:Kannozinzya0ɨ.jpg|250px]]
Torii and worship hall |所在地= {{jalink|Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454}}{{jalink|Nakatado District|Q1206155}}{{jalink|Manno|Q1350204}} Kanno 168-2 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{jalink|Mizuhanome no Mikoto}}、{{jalink|Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto}}、{{jalink|Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto}}、{{jalink|Emperor Sujun|Q316654}} |社格= {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} |創建= early {{jalink|Heian period|Q193292}} |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kagawa|label=神野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Kanno Shrine''' (かんのじんじゃ) is a historic shrine in Kanno, {{jalink|Manno|Q1350204}}, {{jalink|Nakatado District|Q1206155}}, {{jalink|Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454}}. It was enshrined as guardian deity of {{jalink|Mannō Pond|Q20983084}} and counted as one of the 24 Engishiki shrines of Sanuki. The enshrined deities are said to be {{jalink|Mizuhanome no Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto}}, and {{jalink|Emperor Sujun|Q316654}}[http://kagawa.bine.jp/jinnjya/manou/53kano/kanno53.html Kanno Shrine]. File:Kannnozinzya02.jpg|Mannō Pond viewed from the precincts === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Pref-substub|pref=香川県}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かんのしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sanuki Province]] [[Category:香川県の神社]] [[Category:讃岐国の式内社]] [[Category:まんのう町の建築物]] [[Category:まんのう町の歴史]] [[Category:pages]]

Torii and worship hall |所在地= {{jalink|Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454}}{{jalink|Nakatado District|Q1206155}}{{jalink|Manno|Q1350204}} Kanno 168-2 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{jalink|Mizuhanome no Mikoto}}、{{jalink|Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto}}、{{jalink|Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto}}、{{jalink|Emperor Sujun|Q316654}} |社格= {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} |創建= early {{jalink|Heian period|Q193292}} |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kagawa|label=神野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Kanno Shrine''' (かんのじんじゃ) is a historic shrine in Kanno, {{jalink|Manno|Q1350204}}, {{jalink|Nakatado District|Q1206155}}, {{jalink|Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454}}. It was enshrined as guardian deity of {{jalink|Mannō Pond|Q20983084}} and counted as one of the 24 Engishiki shrines of Sanuki. The enshrined deities are said to be {{jalink|Mizuhanome no Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto}}, and {{jalink|Emperor Sujun|Q316654}}[http://kagawa.bine.jp/jinnjya/manou/53kano/kanno53.html Kanno Shrine]. File:Kannnozinzya02.jpg|Mannō Pond viewed from the precincts === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Pref-substub|pref=香川県}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かんのしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sanuki Province]] [[Category:香川県の神社]] [[Category:讃岐国の式内社]] [[Category:まんのう町の建築物]] [[Category:まんのう町の歴史]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]]

It was enshrined as guardian deity of {{jalink|Mannō Pond|Q20983084}} and counted as one of the 24 Engishiki shrines of Sanuki. The enshrined deities are said to be {{jalink|Mizuhanome no Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto}}, and {{jalink|Emperor Sujun|Q316654}}[http://kagawa.bine.jp/jinnjya/manou/53kano/kanno53.html Kanno Shrine]. File:Kannnozinzya02.jpg|Mannō Pond viewed from the precincts === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Pref-substub|pref=香川県}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かんのしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sanuki Province]] [[Category:香川県の神社]] [[Category:讃岐国の式内社]] [[Category:まんのう町の建築物]] [[Category:まんのう町の歴史]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

[[JA:神野神社 (まんのう町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11590985}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2010年12月}} {{神社 |名称= Kanno Shrine |画像= [[File:Kannozinzya0ɨ.jpg|250px]]
Torii and worship hall |所在地= {{jalink|Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454}}{{jalink|Nakatado District|Q1206155}}{{jalink|Manno|Q1350204}} Kanno 168-2 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{jalink|Mizuhanome no Mikoto}}、{{jalink|Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto}}、{{jalink|Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto}}、{{jalink|Emperor Sujun|Q316654}} |社格= {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} |創建= early {{jalink|Heian period|Q193292}} |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kagawa|label=神野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Kanno Shrine''' (かんのじんじゃ) is a historic shrine in Kanno, {{jalink|Manno|Q1350204}}, {{jalink|Nakatado District|Q1206155}}, {{jalink|Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454}}. It was enshrined as guardian deity of {{jalink|Mannō Pond|Q20983084}} and counted as one of the 24 Engishiki shrines of Sanuki. The enshrined deities are said to be {{jalink|Mizuhanome no Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto}}, and {{jalink|Emperor Sujun|Q316654}}[http://kagawa.bine.jp/jinnjya/manou/53kano/kanno53.html Kanno Shrine]. {{ill|Kamunono Shrine|lt=Kamunono Shrine|WD=Q135041391}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '香川県仲多度郡まんのう町神野168-2', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:神野神社 (まんのう町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11590985}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2010年12月}} {{神社 |名称= Kanno Shrine |画像= [[File:Kannozinzya0ɨ.jpg|250px]]
Torii and worship hall |所在地= {{ill|lt=Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454|WD=Q161454}}{{ill|lt=Nakatado District|Q1206155|WD=Q1206155}}{{ill|lt=Manno|Q1350204|WD=Q1350204}} Kanno 168-2 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{ill||lt=Mizuhanome no Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}、{{ill||lt=Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}、{{ill||lt=Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}、{{ill|lt=Emperor Sujun|Q316654|WD=Q316654}} |社格= {{ill||lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}} |創建= early {{ill|lt=Heian period|Q193292|WD=Q193292}} |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kagawa|label=神野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Kanno Shrine''' (かんのじんじゃ) is a historic shrine in Kanno, {{ill|lt=Manno|Q1350204|WD=Q1350204}}, {{ill|lt=Nakatado District|Q1206155|WD=Q1206155}}, {{ill|lt=Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454|WD=Q161454}}. It was enshrined as guardian deity of {{ill|lt=Mannō Pond|Q20983084|WD=Q20983084}} and counted as one of the 24 Engishiki shrines of Sanuki. The enshrined deities are said to be {{ill||lt=Mizuhanome no Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}, {{ill||lt=Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}, {{ill||lt=Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}, and {{ill|lt=Emperor Sujun|Q316654|WD=Q316654}}[http://kagawa.bine.jp/jinnjya/manou/53kano/kanno53.html Kanno Shrine]. File:Kannnozinzya02.jpg|Mannō Pond viewed from the precincts === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Pref-substub|pref=香川県}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かんのしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sanuki Province]] [[Category:香川県の神社]] [[Category:讃岐国の式内社]] [[Category:まんのう町の建築物]] [[Category:まんのう町の歴史]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qqq]]

{{ill|Kamunono Shrine|lt=Kamunono Shrine|WD=Q135041391}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '香川県仲多度郡まんのう町神野168-2', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:神野神社 (まんのう町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11590985}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2010年12月}} {{神社 |名称= Kanno Shrine |画像= [[File:Kannozinzya0ɨ.jpg|250px]]
Torii and worship hall |所在地= {{ill|lt=Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454|WD=Q161454}}{{ill|lt=Nakatado District|Q1206155|WD=Q1206155}}{{ill|lt=Manno|Q1350204|WD=Q1350204}} Kanno 168-2 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Mizuhanome no Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}、{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}、{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}、{{ill|lt=Emperor Sujun|Q316654|WD=Q316654}} |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}} |創建= early {{ill|lt=Heian period|Q193292|WD=Q193292}} |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kagawa|label=神野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Kanno Shrine''' (かんのじんじゃ) is a historic shrine in Kanno, {{ill|lt=Manno|Q1350204|WD=Q1350204}}, {{ill|lt=Nakatado District|Q1206155|WD=Q1206155}}, {{ill|lt=Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454|WD=Q161454}}. It was enshrined as guardian deity of {{ill|lt=Mannō Pond|Q20983084|WD=Q20983084}} and counted as one of the 24 Engishiki shrines of Sanuki. The enshrined deities are said to be {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Mizuhanome no Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}, and {{ill|lt=Emperor Sujun|Q316654|WD=Q316654}}[http://kagawa.bine.jp/jinnjya/manou/53kano/kanno53.html Kanno Shrine]. File:Kannnozinzya02.jpg|Mannō Pond viewed from the precincts === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Pref-substub|pref=香川県}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かんのしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sanuki Province]] [[Category:香川県の神社]] [[Category:讃岐国の式内社]] [[Category:まんのう町の建築物]] [[Category:まんのう町の歴史]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qqq]]

[[JA:神野神社 (まんのう町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11590985}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2010年12月}} {{神社 |名称= Kanno Shrine |画像= [[File:Kannozinzya0ɨ.jpg|250px]]
Torii and worship hall |所在地= {{ill|lt=Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454|WD=Q161454}}{{ill|lt=Nakatado District|Q1206155|WD=Q1206155}}{{ill|lt=Manno|Q1350204|WD=Q1350204}} Kanno 168-2 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Mizuhanome no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}、{{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q10940685|lt=Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}、{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}、{{ill|lt=Emperor Sujun|Q316654|WD=Q316654}} |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} |創建= early {{ill|lt=Heian period|Q193292|WD=Q193292}} |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kagawa|label=神野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Kanno Shrine''' (かんのじんじゃ) is a historic shrine in Kanno, {{ill|lt=Manno|Q1350204|WD=Q1350204}}, {{ill|lt=Nakatado District|Q1206155|WD=Q1206155}}, {{ill|lt=Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454|WD=Q161454}}. It was enshrined as guardian deity of {{ill|lt=Mannō Pond|Q20983084|WD=Q20983084}} and counted as one of the 24 Engishiki shrines of Sanuki. The enshrined deities are said to be {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Mizuhanome no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q10940685|lt=Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, and {{ill|lt=Emperor Sujun|Q316654|WD=Q316654}}[http://kagawa.bine.jp/jinnjya/manou/53kano/kanno53.html Kanno Shrine]. File:Kannnozinzya02.jpg|Mannō Pond viewed from the precincts === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Pref-substub|pref=香川県}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かんのしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sanuki Province]] [[Category:香川県の神社]] [[Category:讃岐国の式内社]] [[Category:まんのう町の建築物]] [[Category:まんのう町の歴史]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qqq]]

[[JA:神野神社 (まんのう町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11590985}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2010年12月}} {{神社 |名称= Kanno Shrine |画像= [[File:Kannozinzya0ɨ.jpg|250px]]
Torii and worship hall |所在地= {{ill|lt=Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454|WD=Q161454}}{{ill|lt=Nakatado District|Q1206155|WD=Q1206155}}{{ill|lt=Manno|Q1350204|WD=Q1350204}} Kanno 168-2 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Mizuhanome no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}、{{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q10940685|lt=Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}、{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}、{{ill|lt=Emperor Sujun|Q316654|WD=Q316654}} |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} |創建= early {{ill|lt=Heian period|Q193292|WD=Q193292}} |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kagawa|label=神野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Kanno Shrine''' (かんのじんじゃ) is a historic shrine in Kanno, {{ill|lt=Manno|Q1350204|WD=Q1350204}}, {{ill|lt=Nakatado District|Q1206155|WD=Q1206155}}, {{ill|lt=Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454|WD=Q161454}}. It was enshrined as guardian deity of {{ill|lt=Mannō Pond|Q20983084|WD=Q20983084}} and counted as one of the 24 Engishiki shrines of Sanuki. The enshrined deities are said to be {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Mizuhanome no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q10940685|lt=Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, and {{ill|lt=Emperor Sujun|Q316654|WD=Q316654}}[http://kagawa.bine.jp/jinnjya/manou/53kano/kanno53.html Kanno Shrine]. File:Kannnozinzya02.jpg|Mannō Pond viewed from the precincts === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Pref-substub|pref=香川県}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かんのしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sanuki Province]] [[Category:香川県の神社]] [[Category:讃岐国の式内社]] [[Category:まんのう町の建築物]] [[Category:まんのう町の歴史]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qqq]]

'香川県仲多度郡まんのう町神野168-2', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:神野神社 (まんのう町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11590985}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2010年12月}} {{神社 |名称= Kanno Shrine |画像= [[File:Kannozinzya0ɨ.jpg|250px]]
Torii and worship hall |所在地= {{ill|lt=Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454|WD=Q161454|1=Kagawa Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nakatado District|Q1206155|WD=Q1206155|1=Nakatado District, Kagawa}}{{ill|lt=Manno|Q1350204|WD=Q1350204|1=Mannō, Kagawa}} Kanno 168-2 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Mizuhanome no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}、{{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q10940685|lt=Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto|1=Ame no Hohi}}、{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}、{{ill|lt=Emperor Sujun|Q316654|WD=Q316654|1=Emperor Saga}} |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建= early {{ill|lt=Heian period|Q193292|WD=Q193292|1=Heian period}} |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kagawa|label=神野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Kanno Shrine''' (かんのじんじゃ) is a historic shrine in Kanno, {{ill|lt=Manno|Q1350204|WD=Q1350204|1=Mannō, Kagawa}}, {{ill|lt=Nakatado District|Q1206155|WD=Q1206155|1=Nakatado District, Kagawa}}, {{ill|lt=Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454|WD=Q161454|1=Kagawa Prefecture}}. It was enshrined as guardian deity of {{ill|lt=Mannō Pond|Q20983084|WD=Q20983084|1=Manno Lake}} and counted as one of the 24 Engishiki shrines of Sanuki. The enshrined deities are said to be {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Mizuhanome no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q10940685|lt=Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto|1=Ame no Hohi}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, and {{ill|lt=Emperor Sujun|Q316654|WD=Q316654|1=Emperor Saga}}[http://kagawa.bine.jp/jinnjya/manou/53kano/kanno53.html Kanno Shrine]. File:Kannnozinzya02.jpg|Mannō Pond viewed from the precincts === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Pref-substub|pref=香川県}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かんのしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sanuki Province]] [[Category:香川県の神社]] [[Category:讃岐国の式内社]] [[Category:まんのう町の建築物]] [[Category:まんのう町の歴史]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qqq]]

'香川県仲多度郡まんのう町神野168-2', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:神野神社 (まんのう町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11590985}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2010年12月}} {{神社 |名称= Kanno Shrine |画像= [[File:Kannozinzya0ɨ.jpg|250px]]
Torii and worship hall |所在地= {{ill|lt=Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454|WD=Q161454|1=Kagawa Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nakatado District|Q1206155|WD=Q1206155|1=Nakatado District, Kagawa}}{{ill|lt=Manno|Q1350204|WD=Q1350204|1=Mannō, Kagawa}} Kanno 168-2 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Mizuhanome no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}、{{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q10940685|lt=Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto|1=Ame no Hohi}}、{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}、{{ill|lt=Emperor Sujun|Q316654|WD=Q316654|1=Emperor Saga}} |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建= early {{ill|lt=Heian period|Q193292|WD=Q193292|1=Heian period}} |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kagawa|label=神野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Kanno Shrine''' (かんのじんじゃ) is a historic shrine in Kanno, {{ill|lt=Manno|Q1350204|WD=Q1350204|1=Mannō, Kagawa}}, {{ill|lt=Nakatado District|Q1206155|WD=Q1206155|1=Nakatado District, Kagawa}}, {{ill|lt=Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454|WD=Q161454|1=Kagawa Prefecture}}. It was enshrined as guardian deity of {{ill|lt=Mannō Pond|Q20983084|WD=Q20983084|1=Manno Lake}} and counted as one of the 24 Engishiki shrines of Sanuki. The enshrined deities are said to be {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Mizuhanome no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q10940685|lt=Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto|1=Ame no Hohi}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, and {{ill|lt=Emperor Sujun|Q316654|WD=Q316654|1=Emperor Saga}}[http://kagawa.bine.jp/jinnjya/manou/53kano/kanno53.html Kanno Shrine]. File:Kannnozinzya02.jpg|Mannō Pond viewed from the precincts === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Pref-substub|pref=香川県}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かんのしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sanuki Province]] [[Category:香川県の神社]] [[Category:讃岐国の式内社]] [[Category:まんのう町の建築物]] [[Category:まんのう町の歴史]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qqq]]

'香川県仲多度郡まんのう町神野168-2', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:神野神社 (まんのう町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11590985}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2010年12月}} {{神社 |名称= Kanno Shrine |画像= [[File:Kannozinzya0ɨ.jpg|250px]]
Torii and worship hall |所在地= {{ill|lt=Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454|WD=Q161454|1=Kagawa Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nakatado District|Q1206155|WD=Q1206155|1=Nakatado District, Kagawa}}{{ill|lt=Manno|Q1350204|WD=Q1350204|1=Mannō, Kagawa}} Kanno 168-2 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Mizuhanome no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}、{{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q10940685|lt=Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto|1=Ame no Hohi}}、{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}、{{ill|lt=Emperor Sujun|Q316654|WD=Q316654|1=Emperor Saga}} |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建= early {{ill|lt=Heian period|Q193292|WD=Q193292|1=Heian period}} |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kagawa|label=神野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Kanno Shrine''' (かんのじんじゃ) is a historic shrine in Kanno, {{ill|lt=Manno|Q1350204|WD=Q1350204|1=Mannō, Kagawa}}, {{ill|lt=Nakatado District|Q1206155|WD=Q1206155|1=Nakatado District, Kagawa}}, {{ill|lt=Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454|WD=Q161454|1=Kagawa Prefecture}}. It was enshrined as guardian deity of {{ill|lt=Mannō Pond|Q20983084|WD=Q20983084|1=Manno Lake}} and counted as one of the 24 Engishiki shrines of Sanuki. The enshrined deities are said to be {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Mizuhanome no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q10940685|lt=Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto|1=Ame no Hohi}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, and {{ill|lt=Emperor Sujun|Q316654|WD=Q316654|1=Emperor Saga}}[http://kagawa.bine.jp/jinnjya/manou/53kano/kanno53.html Kanno Shrine]. File:Kannnozinzya02.jpg|Mannō Pond viewed from the precincts === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Pref-substub|pref=香川県}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sanuki Province]] [[Category:香川県の神社]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sanuki Province]] [[Category:まんのう町の建築物]] [[Category:まんのう町の歴史]] [[Category:pages]]

'香川県仲多度郡まんのう町神野168-2', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:神野神社 (まんのう町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11590985}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2010年12月}} {{神社 |名称= Kanno Shrine |画像= [[File:Kannozinzya0ɨ.jpg|250px]]
Torii and worship hall |所在地= {{ill|lt=Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454|WD=Q161454|1=Kagawa Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nakatado District|Q1206155|WD=Q1206155|1=Nakatado District, Kagawa}}{{ill|lt=Manno|Q1350204|WD=Q1350204|1=Mannō, Kagawa}} Kanno 168-2 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Mizuhanome no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}、{{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q10940685|lt=Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto|1=Ame no Hohi}}、{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}、{{ill|lt=Emperor Sujun|Q316654|WD=Q316654|1=Emperor Saga}} |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建= early {{ill|lt=Heian period|Q193292|WD=Q193292|1=Heian period}} |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kagawa|label=神野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Kanno Shrine''' (かんのじんじゃ) is a historic shrine in Kanno, {{ill|lt=Manno|Q1350204|WD=Q1350204|1=Mannō, Kagawa}}, {{ill|lt=Nakatado District|Q1206155|WD=Q1206155|1=Nakatado District, Kagawa}}, {{ill|lt=Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454|WD=Q161454|1=Kagawa Prefecture}}. It was enshrined as guardian deity of {{ill|lt=Mannō Pond|Q20983084|WD=Q20983084|1=Manno Lake}} and counted as one of the 24 Engishiki shrines of Sanuki. The enshrined deities are said to be {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Mizuhanome no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q10940685|lt=Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto|1=Ame no Hohi}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, and {{ill|lt=Emperor Sujun|Q316654|WD=Q316654|1=Emperor Saga}}[http://kagawa.bine.jp/jinnjya/manou/53kano/kanno53.html Kanno Shrine]. File:Kannnozinzya02.jpg|Mannō Pond viewed from the precincts === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Pref-substub|pref=香川県}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sanuki Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sanuki Province]] [[Category:まんのう町の建築物]] [[Category:まんのう町の歴史]] [[Category:pages]]

'香川県仲多度郡まんのう町神野168-2', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:神野神社 (まんのう町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11590985}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2010年12月}} {{神社 |名称= Kanno Shrine |画像= [[File:Kannozinzya0ɨ.jpg|250px]]
Torii and worship hall |所在地= {{ill|lt=Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454|WD=Q161454|1=Kagawa Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nakatado District|Q1206155|WD=Q1206155|1=Nakatado District, Kagawa}}{{ill|lt=Manno|Q1350204|WD=Q1350204|1=Mannō, Kagawa}} Kanno 168-2 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Mizuhanome no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}、{{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q10940685|lt=Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto|1=Ame no Hohi}}、{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}、{{ill|lt=Emperor Sujun|Q316654|WD=Q316654|1=Emperor Saga}} |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建= early {{ill|lt=Heian period|Q193292|WD=Q193292|1=Heian period}} |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kagawa|label=神野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Kanno Shrine''' (かんのじんじゃ) is a historic shrine in Kanno, {{ill|lt=Manno|Q1350204|WD=Q1350204|1=Mannō, Kagawa}}, {{ill|lt=Nakatado District|Q1206155|WD=Q1206155|1=Nakatado District, Kagawa}}, {{ill|lt=Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454|WD=Q161454|1=Kagawa Prefecture}}. It was enshrined as guardian deity of {{ill|lt=Mannō Pond|Q20983084|WD=Q20983084|1=Manno Lake}} and counted as one of the 24 Engishiki shrines of Sanuki. The enshrined deities are said to be {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Mizuhanome no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q10940685|lt=Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto|1=Ame no Hohi}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, and {{ill|lt=Emperor Sujun|Q316654|WD=Q316654|1=Emperor Saga}}[http://kagawa.bine.jp/jinnjya/manou/53kano/kanno53.html Kanno Shrine]. File:Kannnozinzya02.jpg|Mannō Pond viewed from the precincts === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Pref-substub|pref=香川県}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sanuki Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sanuki Province]] [[Category:まんのう町の建築物]] [[Category:まんのう町の歴史]]

'香川県仲多度郡まんのう町神野168-2', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:神野神社 (まんのう町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11590985}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2010年12月}} {{神社 |名称= Kanno Shrine |画像= [[File:Kannozinzya0ɨ.jpg|250px]]
Torii and worship hall |所在地= {{ill|lt=Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454|WD=Q161454|1=Kagawa Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nakatado District|Q1206155|WD=Q1206155|1=Nakatado District, Kagawa}}{{ill|lt=Manno|Q1350204|WD=Q1350204|1=Mannō, Kagawa}} Kanno 168-2 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Mizuhanome no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}、{{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q10940685|lt=Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto|1=Ame no Hohi}}、{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}、{{ill|lt=Emperor Sujun|Q316654|WD=Q316654|1=Emperor Saga}} |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建= early {{ill|lt=Heian period|Q193292|WD=Q193292|1=Heian period}} |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kagawa|label=神野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Kanno Shrine''' (かんのじんじゃ) is a historic shrine in Kanno, {{ill|lt=Manno|Q1350204|WD=Q1350204|1=Mannō, Kagawa}}, {{ill|lt=Nakatado District|Q1206155|WD=Q1206155|1=Nakatado District, Kagawa}}, {{ill|lt=Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454|WD=Q161454|1=Kagawa Prefecture}}. It was enshrined as guardian deity of {{ill|lt=Mannō Pond|Q20983084|WD=Q20983084|1=Manno Lake}} and counted as one of the 24 Engishiki shrines of Sanuki. The enshrined deities are said to be {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Mizuhanome no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q10940685|lt=Ame-no-Hohi no Mikoto|1=Ame no Hohi}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Wakeikazuchi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, and {{ill|lt=Emperor Sujun|Q316654|WD=Q316654|1=Emperor Saga}}[http://kagawa.bine.jp/jinnjya/manou/53kano/kanno53.html Kanno Shrine]. File:Kannnozinzya02.jpg|Mannō Pond viewed from the precincts === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Pref-substub|pref=香川県}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kanno Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sanuki Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sanuki Province]] [[Category:Buildings in Mannō]] [[Category:まんのう町の歴史]]
